archived.title: Fix stale run.factions: propagate meta.faction_rep to AI context
archived.notes: Fixed 6 stale faction reads across 3 files: (1) rag_manager.gd: _get_crisis_context, _get_faction_context, _get_aspects_state_context, _find_dominant_faction — all 4 now use game_state.get('meta',{}).get('faction_rep',{}). (2) merlin_llm_adapter.gd: build_narrative_context line 708 now uses meta.get('faction_rep',{}).duplicate(); build_context line 729 adds var meta from state and uses meta.get('faction_rep',{}). (3) event_category_selector.gd: injected dominant_faction from BIOMES[biome] into enriched_run for biome-based routing (director q-20260413-002). context_builder.gd and merlin_omniscient.gd were already correctly using meta.faction_rep from prior cycles.
